description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 합성 데이터 사이의 경계를 탐구하며, 전광과 디지털 정보로 고동치는 사이버네틱 꽃을 묘사합니다.
description.en: An exploration of the boundary between organic life and synthetic data, featuring a cybernetic blossom that pulses with electric light and digital information.

prompt: Hyper-realistic close-up of a futuristic flower with translucent petals containing glowing fiber-optic circuits, digital glitch effects around the edges, bioluminescent pollen floating like pixels, dark reflective background with a subtle neon grid, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, cybernetic nature aesthetic.
